explanation: Inserted quotes around the file path to test if the Sigma rule detects quoted wildcards.
Used double backslashes for path normalization to test if the Sigma rule handles escaped paths.
Substituted 'del' with its equivalent command 'erase' to test if the Sigma rule detects both variations.
Modified the path to include an explicit directory traversal to test if the Sigma rule handles nested paths.
Changed the file extension to test if the Sigma rule is specific to certain extensions or broadly detects wildcards.
